Baha Burger

Menu

Baha Burger

Sunday: 11:00 AM - 8:00 PM
Monday: Closed
Tuesday: 11:00 AM - 9:00 PM
Wednesday: 11:00 AM - 9:00 PM
Thursday: 11:00 AM - 9:00 PM
Friday: 11:00 AM - 9:00 PM
Saturday: 11:00 AM - 9:00 PM

Classic Burger

American cheese, mayo, ketchup, mustard, onions, lettuce, tomato and pickles. Served on an Old Fashion Bun.

Catfish Basket

Catfish filet fried to perfection, served with tartar sauce, skinny fries, fruit, and a roll.

Grilled Salmon Filet

Served over mixed greens, tomatoes, cucumber, Tzatziki sauce, peperoncinis, kalamata olives, grilled onions, roasted red peppers.

We have more

Ambiance, exotic drinks, specialty sauces, environment, you have to see it for yourself.

Drinks

We carry a wide variety of drinks, including beer, wine, and Coca-Cola products.

Gourmet Spins

Baha Burger specializes in gourmet spins on classic burgers, such as the Bacon Swiss and our signature Baha Pineapple Burger.

Vestavia Location

Our Vestavia location is situated just south of the big city. Come by for some peace and quiet from the hustle and bustle of the city.

Hoover Location

Our Hoover location is located at the epicenter of the city, perfect for a break between running some errands.

Get in touch

Got feedback, questions, or ideas for your next visit? Send us a message. Your thoughts help us keep serving up great flavors and even better experiences.

  • Hoover: 4745 Chace Cir, Hoover, AL 35244
  • Vestavia: 3060 Healthy Way, Birmingham, AL 35243
  • Hoover: (205) 682 - 6980
  • Vestavia: (205) 644 - 8254
